// Structure: Array
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

internal static class FastData
{

    private static char GetFirstChar(string str) => str[0];
    private static char GetLastChar(string str) => str[str.Length - 1];
    private static int GetLength(string str) => str.Length;


    private static readonly string[] _keys = new string[] {
        "alpha", "bravo", "charlie", "delta"
    };

    
    public static bool Contains(string key)
    {
        int getLength;
        char getFirstChar;
        char getLastChar;
        getLength = GetLength(key);
        if ((getLength > 7))
        {
         return false;
        }

        getFirstChar = GetFirstChar(key);
        if ((getFirstChar > 'd'))
        {
         return false;
        }

        getLastChar = GetLastChar(key);
        if ((getLastChar > 'o'))
        {
         return false;
        }

        if (((((ulong.MinValue & (1ul << (int)((uint)getLastChar & 63u))) & ~(ulong.MinValue - (ulong)((uint)getLastChar >> 6))) | ((140883517243392ul & (1ul << (int)((uint)getLastChar & 63u))) & (ulong.MinValue - (ulong)((uint)getLastChar >> 6)))) == ulong.MinValue))
        {
         return false;
        }



        for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++)
        {
            if (StringComparer.Ordinal.Equals(key, _keys[i]))
                return true;
        }
        return false;
    }

    public const int ItemCount = 4;
    public const int MinKeyLength = 5;
    public const int MaxKeyLength = 7;
    public const bool HasNumber = false;
    public const bool HasUppercase = false;
    public const bool HasLowercase = true;
    public const bool HasSymbol = false;
    public const bool HasWhitespace = false;
}
